title: aster diplostephioides subsp. delavayi
intro: Aster diplostephioides subsp. delavayi, also known as the Delavay's asters, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Aster diplostephioides subsp. delavayi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
